Interface ILasDatasetEdit

Provides access to members of LasDataset.

[Guid("CA6228E2-EB8F-442F-88CB-5E40233E88E8")]

public interface ILasDatasetEdit

UsesRelativePath

Indicates if the dataset is saved with relative path.
